# MainContent Specification

> Source: https://gameui.ai/project/8578c2a6-88a0-431a-aad1-5a8c67ef8a19

## Overview
- **Target file:** `src/components/MainContent.tsx`
- **Screenshot:** `docs/design-references/` (see captured screenshots)
- **Children:** 62 descendants

## DOM Structure

```
<main.flex-1.relative.overflow-hidden.bg-neutral-950.select-none>
  <div.absolute.inset-0.overflow-hidden.cursor-grab.active:cursor-grabbing>
    <div.absolute.inset-0.pointer-events-none>
    <div.absolute.top-0.left-0.origin-top-left.will-change-transform>
      <div.absolute>
        <div.rounded-2xl.border-4.border-cyan-300/80.bg-neutral-900/95.w-full>
          <div.flex.items-center.gap-2.mb-2>
            <div.w-2.h-2.rounded-full.bg-amber-400>
            <span.font-bold.text-sm.text-white.truncate> "项目 1"
            <button.shrink-0.p-1.rounded-md.text-gray-300.hover:text-white>
              <svg>
                <path>
                <path>
          <div.relative.w-full.rounded-lg.border-2.border-neutral-700>
            <img.absolute.inset-0.w-full.h-full.object-cover>
      <div.absolute>
      <div.absolute>
        <div.rounded-xl.shadow-xl.flex.flex-col.border>
          <div.p-3.border-b.flex.justify-between.items-center>
            <div.flex.items-center.gap-2.flex-1.min-w-0>
              <div.w-2.h-2.rounded-full.flex-shrink-0.bg-blue-400>
              <span.font-bold.text-sm.text-white.truncate> "Home"
              <span.px-1.5.py-0.5.rounded.text-[10px].font-semibold> "界面"
            <div.flex.gap-1.flex-shrink-0>
              <button.group.relative.text-gray-400.hover:text-white.p-1>
              <button.group.relative.text-gray-400.hover:text-red-400.p-1>
          <div.p-3.relative>
            <div.flex.gap-3.justify-center.items-center.flex-row>
              <div.flex-shrink-0>
              <div.flex-shrink-0>
            <div.mt-3.flex.items-center.gap-2.overflow-x-auto>
              <button.shrink-0.px-2.5.py-1.rounded-md.text-xs> "v1"
            <button.relative.overflow-hidden.w-full.mt-3.bg-gradient-to-r>
              <span.pointer-events-none.absolute.top-0.right-0.w-8>
              <svg>
                <path>
                <path>
                <path>
                <path>
                <path>
                <path>
                <path>
                <path>
              <span> "重新生成"
  <div.absolute.top-4.right-4.z-40.flex>
    <button.p-2.5.rounded-xl.bg-neutral-900/90.border.border-neutral-700>
      <svg>
        <path>
        <circle>
    <button.p-2.5.rounded-xl.bg-neutral-900/90.border.border-neutral-700>
      <svg>
        <path>
        <circle>
  <div.absolute.bottom-8.right-8.z-40>
    <div.w-14.h-14.rounded-full.bg-neutral-900.border-2>
      <svg>
        <path>
        <path>
        <path>
        <line>
        <line>
      <span.absolute.-bottom-8.text-xs.text-gray-500.font-medium> "回收站"
      <div.absolute.top-0.right-0.w-5.h-5> "2"
```
